forceNotice: This maintenance window cannot be dismissed. The system may be temporarily unavailable.

limitedMode.title: Maintenance Mode — Limited Access
limitedMode.description: Some operations are temporarily disabled. You can view data but cannot modify it.

manage.pageSubtitle: Start and end platform-wide maintenance windows. While active, the system runs in limited (read-mostly) mode: POS payments and write APIs are blocked for non-SuperAdmin users.
manage.accessDenied: Only Super Admins can manage system maintenance.
manage.blocksHint: Limited mode: reads allowed; POS payments and write APIs blocked for non-SuperAdmin users.
manage.endConfirmBody: All active maintenance windows will be completed. Clients regain normal access.
